name: restaurant-about-us-page
title: About Us Page — 10 Independent Sections
description: Full About Us page composed of 10 independent sections: hero-section, venue-gallery-section, story-section, cuisine-philosophy-section, awards-section, team-section, values-section, location-section, faq-section, and cta-section. Each section has primary + template-2 + template-3 variants (except awards, which is primary-only). Shaans verdict: 'not that bad.' FAQ question pills flagged as a clean extraction candidate.

files.note: template files (primary, template-2, template-3) and component subtrees for all 10 sections are inside sections/*/templates/ and sections/*/components/ — see folder listing for all 140 files

preview.reason: Imports @/domains/shared/section-tools (90 refs), @/domains/shared/components (18 refs), @/lib/utils, @storybook/react, @/components/ui/faq-chat-accordion, @/components/ui/timeline-component which are restaurant-app-solo internals. 140 TSX/TS files total — preserved as code-reference with section-level entries.
